caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with gold lettering that reads "BOSS TALK", and a gold chain is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing headphones and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a logo with five gold stars and the word "HUSTLE," as well as a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right sits a black mug with "TALK OUT" printed on it. Across the frames, the man is captured mid-speech, gesturing with his right hand raised and fingers slightly curled to emphasize his points. While his overall position remains constant, his facial expression and hand posture shift slightly as he continues talking, moving from a more open gesture to a more closed, pointed hand position.
